The Finngoalie Box Control Angle System is the perfect tool for goaltenders of all levels who want to improve their game. With this system, goaltenders can practice controlling the angles and depths of their movements in the net. The system consists of adjustable ropes that allow goaltenders to set up an area in which to practice their movements. This practice space can be adjusted to fit the goaltender’s playing style and skill level, allowing for a personalized approach to improvement. Practicing with the Finngoalie Box Control Angle System will help goaltenders improve their footwork, angles, depth control, and overall performance in the net. Put your goaltending skills to the test with the Finngoalie Box Control Angle System!

title: Finnpegs P3G Patented Net Anchoring System
excerpt: **P3G Net System: Revolutionizing Net Stability** **What Are They?** The P3G pegs are expertly crafted from stainless steel and coated with a premium finish…
description_html:
**P3G Net  System: Revolutionizing Net Stability**

**What Are They?**
The P3G pegs are expertly crafted from stainless steel and coated with a premium finish for maximum durability. Featuring a patented three-spike design, the system has been rigorously tested for over 1,000 hours to ensure optimal performance on varying ice conditions. For hard ice, the adjustable middle spike provides superior grip, while it can be easily removed when softer ice calls for the traditional two-spike setup.

**How Do They Work?**
The P3G pegs are built to stay firmly in place under the most intense game conditions—whether during powerful pushes, VH/RVH movements, or incidental contact—without sacrificing player safety. With a built-in safety release, the P3G system is trusted by minor, junior, and professional leagues across North America. Its unique adjustability allows leagues to customize the level of anchoring to match their play style and ice conditions.

**Why Choose P3G?**
- **Designed by Goalies for Goalies:** Engineered to reduce stoppages and ensure fluid, uninterrupted play.
- **Performance-Driven:** Allows for aggressive post-to-post movements without the risk of the net dislodging, enhancing both player safety and competitiveness.
- **Fully Adjustable:** Tailor the system to meet the specific demands of any league or ice surface.

For orders, simply select your desired quantity from the drop-down menu below. We also offer custom color orders on sets of 10 or more and logo customization for an additional $20.

Elevate your game and reduce play stoppages  with the P3G Net System—

title: BRIAN'S OPTIK X4 SENIOR GOALIE PAD
excerpt: OVERVIEW The Brian’s Optik X4 Senior Pads offer elite-level performance in a modern, lightweight design built for competitive goaltenders. With a clean,…
description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Optik X4 Senior Pads offer elite-level performance in a modern, lightweight design built for competitive goaltenders. With a clean, laceless pad face, streamlined profile, and the PRIMO sliding edge, the Optik X4 is engineered for efficient movement, quick recoveries, and a controlled, balanced feel in the crease. From aggressive butterflies to seamless lateral slides, these pads are designed to respond naturally to your game.

Lightweight, customizable, and handcrafted in Canada — the Optik X4 is the perfect blend of performance and precision for today’s goaltender.

KEY FEATURES

Flat, Laceless Pad Face
Clean construction enhances puck control and rebound consistency, offering a modern look and feel.

Streamlined Outer Roll with 80° Toe Taper
Reduces weight and improves seal along the ice — ideal for goaltenders who demand tight post integration and smooth pad rotation.

PRIMO Sliding Edge
Brian’s proprietary sliding surface delivers elite-level glide for effortless movement across the crease.

Optik 4-Style Calf Strapping
Responsive, secure calf wrap system promotes pad rotation and consistent landing, without restricting movement.

Dual Option Knee Strap
Customizable knee strapping lets you tailor your fit — whether you want a tight, connected feel or greater knee flexibility.

Removable Knee Flap
Gives goaltenders the option to modify the knee stack setup for their personal style and comfort.

Smart Cord Toe System
Lightweight elastic toe cord allows natural pad rotation and quick recovery while reducing strain on the skate.

Smart Boot Strap
Streamlined, elastic boot strap improves seal and pad responsiveness during butterfly drops and lateral pushes.

SPECIFICATIONS

  • Pad Face: Flat / Laceless

  • Outer Roll: Streamlined

  • Toe Taper: 80°

  • Sliding Edge: PRIMO

  • Calf Strapping: Optik 4-Style

  • Knee Strapping: Dual Option

  • Knee Flap: Removable

  • Knee Pad Compatibility: Pro 2 Knee Pad – Integrated or Independent

  • Toe Strapping: Smart Cord

  • Boot Strapping: Smart Boot

  • Level: Elite / Senior

  • Construction: Lightweight Profile | Handcrafted in Canada

AVAILABLE VARIANTS

  • Size Range: 33+1, 34+1,  35+1, 36+1

  • Color Options: White, Black, White/Blue, White Red & White/Black/Red

Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

The Optik X4 Senior Pads are a go-to choice for goalies who want speed, structure, and full control in every movement. If you want a streamlined build with elite-level sliding and smart customization options, the X4 checks every box.

description_html:
Bladetech Hockey, based in Toronto, provides high-quality stainless-steel runners for all holder types. Starting in 2015, Bladetech is now the go-to steel for many NHL equipment managers and pro players from around the world.

The company believes in two things: true innovation and the best quality.

The innovation comes in the form of the patented technology called “Flex-Force”.  The unique design of the Bladetech runners allows for the front-third of the blade to flex into the holder, cushioning the joints and storing vertical energy.  Upon extending the stride, the blade whips back, releases the stored energy and propels skaters forward.

This patented technology has been scientifically proven to provide skaters an average of 5.5% increase in speed due to more efficient use of energy and a more powerful stride! “Flex-Force” also cushions skaters’ joints: suffering less injuries as they endure lower impact forces, helping you play longer!

Bladetech Hockey’s high-quality stainless steel replacement runners, for all holder types, is backed by their 365-day warranty.

title: BRIAN'S ICONIK 2 SENIOR GOALIE PADS
excerpt: OVERVIEW The Brian’s Iconik 2 Goalie Pads combine pro-level stability with the signature Brian’s craftsmanship goalies have trusted for decades. Built around a…
description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Iconik 2 Goalie Pads combine pro-level stability with the signature Brian’s craftsmanship goalies have trusted for decades. Built around a flat-faced, laceless design for clean rebounds and a stiff flex profile for controlled movements, these pads deliver an elite balance of responsiveness and structure. Every detail — from the Primo Opti-Slide edge to the Smart Cord toe system — is engineered for goalies who demand precision and efficiency in the crease.

 KEY PERFORMANCE FEATURES

Flat-Faced, Laceless Design
Sleek, modern surface designed for predictable rebounds and improved puck control while maintaining the signature Brian’s responsive feel.

HD Squared Outer Roll & Bri-Core Reinforced Thigh
Durable, high-density construction provides superior seal and stability in the butterfly with enhanced protection across the thigh rise.

Double-Laced, One-Piece Knee Stack
Integrated knee stack design maximizes surface connection and consistency through every drop and recovery movement.

Thin Profile Construction
Streamlined pad core ensures lightweight performance without sacrificing structure or stability.

Velcro Tab Outer Knee Flap
Allows goalies to easily customize their knee cradle setup — open for more rotation or closed for a tighter, connected feel.

Upper Calf Strap
Added support keeps the pad secure and centered through slides and recoveries for a locked-in fit.

Primo Opti-Slide Edge
Brian’s premium sliding material delivers elite-level glide and durability for fast, controlled crease movement in any condition.

87° Toe Taper with Smart Cord Strapping
A responsive 87° toe angle enhances pad rotation while the Smart Cord elastic toe system provides consistent pad return and comfort.

No Boot Strap
Optimized pad rotation and lighter overall feel allow for smoother transitions between post integration and movement sequences.

Stiff Flex Profile
Designed for goalies who prefer a solid, pro-level feel with minimal torsional flex for maximum ice seal and rebound control.

 SPECIFICATIONS

  • Pad Face: Flat / Laceless

  • Outer Roll: HD Squared

  • Thigh Rise: Bri-Core Reinforced

  • Knee Stack: Double-Laced, One-Piece

  • Profile: Thin, Stiff Flex

  • Sliding Surface: Primo Opti-Slide

  • Toe Taper: 87°

  • Toe Strapping: Smart Cord

  • Boot Strap: None

  • Knee Cradle: Adjustable Velcro Tab

  • Level: Elite / Professional

 Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

The Brian’s Iconik 2 Goalie Pads are built for serious goaltenders who crave the structure, precision, and control of a true pro pad. Lightweight yet solid, these pads slide effortlessly, seal perfectly, and give you the confidence to own every rebound.

title: BRIAN'S OPTIK 4 SENIOR GOALIE PADS
excerpt: Growing from the Optik 3 the new Optik 4 from Brian's is built for that goalie looking for maximum coverage down in the butterfly thanks to it's minimal…
description_html:
Growing from the Optik 3 the new Optik 4 from Brian's is built for that goalie looking for maximum coverage down in the butterfly thanks to it's minimal outside roll. The stock option is their MAX Core and Bri-Core construction. They have also gone with a different graphic from the 3 to give you even more options on the custom level with this graphic.

CONSTRUCTION

The pad features Bri-Core which is new to this family, this is an added section of carbon fibre reinforcement at the thigh of the pad to give better stiffness so the pad holds up longer for you during the season. The Optik 4 is available in three flex option, MAX, FLY & FLX, the stock option is MAX which is a stiffer core above the knee with a softer boot and it has more of an angle at the top of the thigh. The FLY is close to what the MAX is but a more straighter design for the pads construction and FLX is a more flexible pad with it's construction.

STRAPPING 

The pad uses it's smart strap system with an adjustable strap at the calf to hold you in place and a re-designed upper calf strap with elastic to fit a wider range of goalies. 

TOE TAPER

For our Optik 4 Pad we have gone with the 90 degree for a more squared off shape to help seal everything up on the ice while going down in the butterfly.

title: BRIAN'S ICONIK 2 SENIOR GOALIE CATCHERE & BLOCKER SET
excerpt: OVERVIEW The Brian’s Iconik 2 Catcher & Blocker Set delivers pro-level balance, protection, and responsiveness for today’s modern goaltender. Both gloves are…
description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Iconik 2 Catcher & Blocker Set delivers pro-level balance, protection, and responsiveness for today’s modern goaltender. Both gloves are designed around the signature Iconik 2 feel — combining premium materials, lightweight construction, and elite innovation. From the glove’s Game Ready Palm and 35° double T pocket to the blocker’s Bri-FUSE reinforced board and Smart Dial custom fit system, this set is engineered to perform at the highest level.

 ICONIK 2 CATCH GLOVE – Key Performance Features

Game Ready Palm
Soft, flexible game-ready break-in right out of the box for maximum comfort and confident puck retention.

35° Closure with Double-T Pocket
Natural catching angle with a wide Double-T pocket creates optimal puck visibility and control in every save sequence.

Nash Palm Liner
Supple Nash liner enhances feel, comfort, and durability while maintaining a secure grip during high-intensity play.

One-Piece Cuff Design
Streamlined cuff construction provides a solid presentation to shooters while maximizing coverage and stability.

Bri-FUSE Cuff Reinforcement
Exclusive Bri-FUSE technology increases cuff rigidity and impact resistance for a pro-level protective feel.

Beveled Thumb Design
Anatomical thumb construction promotes easier closure and a more natural hand position when catching pucks.

Curved Finger Shape
Ergonomic finger contouring provides consistent grip and smooth closure mechanics.

Smart Dial Strapping System
Easy-adjust dial system lets goalies customize wrist and hand tension for a precise, locked-in feel.

Skate Lace Pocket
Traditional skate lace webbing offers soft puck retention and a classic look preferred by pros.

 ICONIK 2 BLOCKER – Key Performance Features

Lightweight, Balanced Construction
Built for effortless rebound control and superior hand mobility in tight situations.

Bri-FUSE Reinforced Board
Stiff, energy-dispersing board delivers consistent rebound direction and long-term durability.

Ergonomic Sidewall Design
Curved sidewall provides natural hand positioning while maximizing coverage and deflection control.

Adjustable Wrist & Palm Strapping
Integrated Smart Dial Fit System ensures a secure, custom fit that adjusts easily mid-game.

Nash Palm with Reinforced Wear Zones
Soft-touch Nash palm provides elite comfort and grip, reinforced in high-contact areas for extended durability.

Curved Finger Protection
Protective wrap design follows the hand’s natural shape for improved control and safety when playing the puck.

Game-Ready Comfort Liner
Moisture-wicking internal liner keeps hands dry and comfortable through long ice sessions.

 SPECIFICATIONS

  • Glove Closure: 35°

  • Palm: Game Ready Nash

  • Pocket: Double-T (Skate Lace)

  • Cuff: One-Piece w/ Bri-FUSE Reinforcement

  • Thumb: Beveled, Ergonomic Design

  • Fit System: Smart Dial Adjustment

  • Blocker Board: Bri-FUSE Reinforced

  • Flex Profile: Balanced / Pro-Level

  • Level: Elite / Professional

 Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

The Brian’s Iconik 2 Catcher & Blocker Set blends classic Brian’s feel with the latest innovations in glove design. The result? Lightning-fast closure, clean rebounds, and unmatched balance. Whether you’re controlling pucks in traffic or flashing the leather, the Iconik 2 gives you every advantage between the pipes.

title: BRIAN'S OPTIK X4 SENIOR GOALIE PAD

description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Optik X4 Senior Pads offer elite-level performance in a modern, lightweight design built for competitive goaltenders. With a clean, laceless pad face, streamlined profile, and the PRIMO sliding edge, the Optik X4 is engineered for efficient movement, quick recoveries, and a controlled, balanced feel in the crease. From aggressive butterflies to seamless lateral slides, these pads are designed to respond naturally to your game.

Lightweight, customizable, and handcrafted in Canada — the Optik X4 is the perfect blend of performance and precision for today’s goaltender.

KEY FEATURES

Flat, Laceless Pad Face
Clean construction enhances puck control and rebound consistency, offering a modern look and feel.

Streamlined Outer Roll with 80° Toe Taper
Reduces weight and improves seal along the ice — ideal for goaltenders who demand tight post integration and smooth pad rotation.

PRIMO Sliding Edge
Brian’s proprietary sliding surface delivers elite-level glide for effortless movement across the crease.

Optik 4-Style Calf Strapping
Responsive, secure calf wrap system promotes pad rotation and consistent landing, without restricting movement.

Dual Option Knee Strap
Customizable knee strapping lets you tailor your fit — whether you want a tight, connected feel or greater knee flexibility.

Removable Knee Flap
Gives goaltenders the option to modify the knee stack setup for their personal style and comfort.

Smart Cord Toe System
Lightweight elastic toe cord allows natural pad rotation and quick recovery while reducing strain on the skate.

Smart Boot Strap
Streamlined, elastic boot strap improves seal and pad responsiveness during butterfly drops and lateral pushes.

SPECIFICATIONS

  • Pad Face: Flat / Laceless

  • Outer Roll: Streamlined

  • Toe Taper: 80°

  • Sliding Edge: PRIMO

  • Calf Strapping: Optik 4-Style

  • Knee Strapping: Dual Option

  • Knee Flap: Removable

  • Knee Pad Compatibility: Pro 2 Knee Pad – Integrated or Independent

  • Toe Strapping: Smart Cord

  • Boot Strapping: Smart Boot

  • Level: Elite / Senior

  • Construction: Lightweight Profile | Handcrafted in Canada

AVAILABLE VARIANTS

  • Size Range: 33+1, 34+1,  35+1, 36+1

  • Color Options: White, Black, White/Blue, White Red & White/Black/Red

Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

The Optik X4 Senior Pads are a go-to choice for goalies who want speed, structure, and full control in every movement. If you want a streamlined build with elite-level sliding and smart customization options, the X4 checks every box.

title: TRUE CATALYST 9X4 SENIOR GOALIE SKATE
excerpt: New for 2024 is a re-designed goal skate with a brand new feature from them to enhance range of motion with the fit from True that you expect. The boot…
description_html:
New for 2024 is a re-designed goal skate with a brand new feature from them to enhance range of motion with the fit from True that you expect. The boot features it's known one piece carbon fibre boot for maximum energy transfer through the crease.

BOOT CONSTRUCTION

Much like the previous model we have a NEUROFIT+ One piece carbon fibre shell with thermoformable materials to give you full wrap around your foot for maximum connection. We do see them introducing a new Motioncuff collar that is a hinge inside the boot to help increase ankle flexion for even better range of motion so you aren't battling the boot anymore. The exterior we see PU side panels for added abraison resistant when moving throughout the crease. Inside the boot they have added a plastic base to help better hold the rivets inside increasing the durability.

LINER & TONGUE

Keeping you locked in is a clarino liner that provides moisture wicking properties to really lock your foot in place throughout the game. To help give added comfort on top of the foot is a lightweight pro goalie tongue with added lacebite protection with the molded insert on top.

description_html:

The Brian’s Optik X4 Intermediate Pads deliver pro-inspired performance in a build designed specifically for developing elite goaltenders. Based off of Optik 4  platform it has been refined with flexible strapping and streamlined design elements for this price point, the X4 offers a responsive, modern feel for today’s hybrid and butterfly goalies. Lightweight and balanced, the Optik X4 helps you slide faster, seal the ice tighter, and recover with confidence — all while maintaining the elite craftsmanship Brian’s is known for.

From precise post integration to clean lateral slides, the Optik X4 is built for control, mobility, and quick-read responsiveness in the crease.

KEY FEATURES

Flat, Laceless Pad Face
A clean and modern look with consistent rebounds and improved visual presentation.

Streamlined Outer Roll with 80° Toe Taper
Reduces unnecessary bulk while enhancing seal along the ice — ideal for butterfly recovery and fast post-play coverage.

PRIMO Sliding Edge
Brian’s proprietary sliding surface delivers smooth, effortless side-to-side movement without sacrificing edge stability.

Optik 4-Style Calf Strapping
Keeps the pad snug to the leg while maintaining full freedom of movement through all save mechanics.

Dual Option Knee Strap
Adjustable for a personalized fit — whether you prefer a connected feel or a looser, more mobile knee setup.

Removable Knee Flap
Lets you tailor the knee stack to your exact preference for maximum comfort and control.

Smart Cord Toe System
Lightweight and adjustable bungee-style cord allows for responsive pad rotation and quick post recoveries.

Smart Boot Strap
Elastic boot strap system improves boot movement and ice seal during pad rotations and butterfly drops.

SPECIFICATIONS

  • Outer Roll: Streamlined

  • Toe Taper: 80°

  • Sliding Edge: PRIMO

  • Calf Strapping: Optik 4-Style

  • Knee Strapping: Dual Option

  • Knee Flap: Removable

  • Knee Pad Compatibility: Pro 2 Knee Pad – Integrated or Independent

  • Toe Strapping: Smart Cord

  • Boot Strapping: Smart Boot

  • Construction: Optik X4 Core with Lightweight Profile

AVAILABLE VARIANTS

  • Size Range: 30+1, 31+1, 32+1

  • Color Options: White, Black, White/Blue, White/Red & White/Black/Red

Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

The Optik X4 is one of the best intermediate pads on the market for goalies who want a clean, modern pad feel with pro-level movement and a forgiving, customizable fit. Perfect for butterfly goalies who want fast recovery and a crisp slide every time.

title: BRIAN'S OPTIK X4 SENIOR GOALIE CATCHER & BLOCKER SET
excerpt: OVERVIEW The Brian’s Optik X4 Senior Import Catcher & Blocker Set is built for goalies who prefer a traditional feel with modern performance upgrades.…
description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Optik X4 Senior Import Catcher & Blocker Set is built for goalies who prefer a traditional feel with modern performance upgrades. Featuring a 40° break glove with a wide single T pocket and a beveled blocker board for clean rebounds, this set offers excellent mobility, coverage, and comfort for goalies who demand reliability from their gear.

The import version of the Optik X4 set maintains Brian’s high standards in construction while offering accessible price points and a responsive fit right off the shelf. With enhanced adjustability, reduced restriction, and smooth puck control, it’s ideal for competitive goaltenders looking for balance between performance and value.

KEY FEATURES – CATCHER

40° Break with Game Ready Palm
A laced-in 40° break gives the glove a natural closing motion for a quick, confident feel without a long break-in.

Single T Pocket with Wide Channel
Traditional-style T promotes excellent puck tracking and retention while maintaining a lightweight presentation.

Floating Wrist Cuff with Traditional Strap
Secure yet mobile — allows for full range of motion while keeping the glove connected to your hand through every movement.

Adjustable Velcro Backhand & Elastic Thumb Strap
Customizes the fit without limiting closure, and reduces wrist slap for a more natural glove movement.

Bevelled Thumb with One-Piece Cuff
Improves puck deflection coverage and provides a wide, stable catching surface.

KEY FEATURES – BLOCKER

Bevelled Board Profile
Helps direct rebounds low and wide with minimal effort — giving you clean deflections every time.

Low Hinged Cuff Opening
Maximizes wrist mobility for poke checks, paddle-down saves, and smooth transitions from stance to movement.

Squared Sidewall with Laced Connection
Laced-in build ensures consistent structure and reduced flaring, keeping the blocker tight and responsive.

Neutral Hand Position with Wide Cuff
Gives a natural feel while allowing full freedom of motion — no interference with stick grip or paddle work.

Removable Sidewall Pillow & Traditional Strapping
Added thumb protection with removable padding for comfort customization, paired with a simple Velcro wrist strap system.

SPECIFICATIONS

Catcher:

  • Break Angle: 40°

  • Palm: Game Ready

  • Pocket: Wide Single T

  • Cuff: One-Piece

  • Thumb: Bevelled

  • Wrist: Floating Cuff | Traditional Webbing Strap

  • Backhand: Adjustable Velcro Strapping

  • Thumb Strap: Elastic Adjustable

Blocker:

  • Board: Bevelled Profile

  • Hand Position: Neutral

  • Cuff: Wide Opening

  • Fingers: Fixed

  • Sidewall: Squared w/ Laced Connection

  • Wrist Strap: Traditional Velcro

  • Added Protection: Removable Sidewall Pillow

AVAILABLE VARIANTS

  • Size: Senior

  • Hand: Regular 

  • Color Options: White, Black, White/Blue, White/Red & White/Black/Red

Just Hockey Toronto Pro Tip

Looking for a traditional feel with modern upgrades? The Optik X4 Import set gives you a game-ready glove and a balanced, mobile blocker — ideal for goalies who want comfort, performance, and a clean fit without over-complication. We can also add White skate lace pocket to your catcher if you like for an additional cost.

excerpt: OVERVIEW The Brian’s Optik X4 Junior Catcher & Blocker Set is built for young goalies learning to read plays, react quickly, and control rebounds with…
description_html:
OVERVIEW

The Brian’s Optik X4 Junior Catcher & Blocker Set is built for young goalies learning to read plays, react quickly, and control rebounds with confidence. Lightweight, balanced, and game-ready, this set mirrors the features of elite-level senior gear but scaled down for youth sizing, comfort, and mobility.

Whether they're just getting into butterfly saves or learning to control the puck with the blocker, the X4 Junior set delivers the fit, feel, and responsiveness that developing goalies need to grow their game with confidence.

KEY FEATURES – CATCHER

40° Break with Game-Ready Feel
Designed for smaller hands, this break angle promotes natural glove closure for easier puck catching and retention.

Single T Pocket with Laced Channel
A deep, wide T helps trap shots cleanly and gives younger goalies strong visual tracking into the glove.

One-Piece Cuff with Bevelled Thumb
Offers stable coverage, excellent protection, and an easy-to-control design that promotes proper catching technique.

Floating Wrist Cuff & Traditional Strap
Provides freedom of movement and a comfortable fit that stays secure throughout games and practices.

Elastic Thumb Strap & Adjustable Backhand
Keeps the glove responsive while offering custom adjustability as young goalies grow.

KEY FEATURES – BLOCKER

Bevelled Board Design
Optimized to deflect pucks away from danger areas while keeping the blocker light and balanced.

Low Hinged Cuff
Improves wrist mobility and stick control, helping younger goalies poke check, pass, and reset quickly.

Squared Sidewall with Laced-In Build
Maintains shape and stability while reducing flaring — great for sealing the post and controlling paddle positioning.

Neutral Hand Position with Wide Cuff Opening
Comfortable for smaller hands and wrists, promoting proper stick handling and blocker control.

Removable Sidewall Pillow & Traditional Velcro Strap
Provides added protection and adjustability, allowing for a snug fit that adapts as players grow.

SPECIFICATIONS

Catcher:

  • Break Angle: 40°

  • Palm: Game Ready

  • Pocket: Single T

  • Cuff: One-Piece

  • Thumb: Bevelled

  • Wrist: Floating Cuff | Traditional Strap

  • Backhand: Adjustable Velcro

  • Thumb Strap: Elastic

Blocker:

  • Board: Bevelled Profile

  • Hand Position: Neutral

  • Cuff: Wide Opening

  • Fingers: Fixed

  • Sidewall: Squared | Laced-In

  • Wrist Strap: Traditional Velcro

  • Sidewall Pillow: Removable

AVAILABLE VARIANTS

  • Size: Junior

  • Hand: Regular

  • Colors: White, Black, White/Blue, White/Red & White/Black/Red

Pro Tip

The Optik X4 Junior set delivers all the right tools to help young goalies feel confident in net — from a natural glove close to a mobile, well-balanced blocker. It’s built to keep up with their growing skills and their growing body. We can also add White skate lace pocket to your catcher if you like for an additional cost.

title: Catchball
excerpt: The Catchball was invented in 1995 by world a renowned goalie coach when he was looking for a tool to quickly and efficiently improve the reaction and hand-eye…
description_html:
The Catchball  was invented in 1995 by world a renowned goalie coach when he was looking for a tool to quickly and efficiently improve the reaction and hand-eye coordination of his goaltenders. Ever since  then, the Catchball  was incredibly popular among professional goaltenders, but never available for purchase. Now, over 20 years later, Prolab Sportsfinally found a way to get the original Catchball  to the masses, because we believe that it should not only be reserved to the pros, but it

should be in every goalie's bag. This is why: A slap

shot from the blue line reaches the net in under .5 seconds, which means that there is no time to think. Reaction and reflexes have to be constantly trained and improved. Just a few minutes with the Catchball per day, wether it is used it for warming up before practice, to cool down post practice, or even before a game, are enough to notice development in the following aspects of a goaltender's game: 

Goalie Hand-Eye Coordination Training starts with juggling and is one of the base pillars of goalie off ice training. The puck is black and so are our juggling balls: your eyes are used to tracking a black object on the ice, so they should be trained to do the same off the ice. Bright-yellow standard balls are easier to track, simply because a black object blends easier with the background just like a puck would. Our test group of goaltenders confirmed that they were more comfortable tracking pucks on the ice after working off the ice with black juggling balls rather than bright yellow ones.​

Along with the Catchball, Black Juggling Balls are a must have for every goaltender that wants to improve their skills.

title: Pro Lace
excerpt: Pro Laces are a new innovation in goalie laces and equipment. Developed in Quebec by goalies for goalies, these laces move away from traditional styles to a…
description_html:
Pro Laces are a new innovation in goalie laces and equipment. Developed in Quebec by goalies for goalies, these laces move away from traditional styles to a bungee-style elastic, easy five-minute installation, and durable Velcro straps. The biggest characteristics of the Pro Laces are that they are built to last and significantly reduce stress on the ankles and knees.

Bungee-style Elastic


The laces are made of a very durable elastic that acts similar to a bungee cord. If you are used to more traditional toe laces, you will likely notice the differences right away. The bungee effect allows the pads quite a bit of extra movement when doing certain maneuvers, such as Butterflies and RVHs. It also causes the pads to snap back in place when recovering. General ankle and knee strain usually caused during the maneuver and recovery stages is soundly reduced, helping you play longer while lowering fatigue and injury risk.

Installation


You have a couple options for installing the Pro Laces onto your pads. The package comes with four screws, which will require a Phillips head screwdriver. Alternatively, you can tie the main leather piece on with waxed laces instead. The package itself comes with an illustrated guide for installing the laces.

  1. To start, take out your current laces and make sure the pads are ready for the installation.
  2. Fold the leather piece of the laces in half.
  3. With a Phillips screwdriver and the included hardware, screw the leather piece onto the front of the toe bridge. If installing with laces, you can take the small metal pieces that are already on the leather out to ensure they don’t rip the laces. Use waxed laces so they don’t wear down as easily on the ice. When securing the laces on the pads, make sure they are tight and stable.
  4. Once you are ready to use the Pro Laces for a game or practice, pull the cord through the centre of the skate. Then, Velcro the pieces together on top of your laces. Make sure they are secure and comfortably tight, so the bungee property can go into effect.
  5. If you don’t think the laces are tight enough, you can criss-cross the laces before pushing them through the centre of the skate.

Like with any new equipment, make sure to give yourself ample time to fit and practice with the laces before use in a game. Pro Laces are sold as a pair and are compatible with most goalie pads.

FINNGOALIE – WEEKLY ELITE GOALIE TRAINING PROGRAM

October 2025 – March 2026 | St. Margaret’s Bay Centre Thursdays @ 6:30AM

Take your game to the next level with a consistent, high-performance weekly goalie training environment. Designed for goaltenders who are serious about developing elite skills through the season.

Weekly Skill-Focused Development Modules

The 2026 FINNGOALIE Summer Weekly Elite Training Program is designed as an intensive off-season development experience for competitive goaltenders looking to elevate their performance heading into the upcoming season. The program consists of six high-level on-ice development sessions combined with specialized off-ice training.

On-Ice Goaltender Training

description_html:
Efficient Movement Clinic featuring NHL Goalie Coach


Former NHL goaltender and current Ottawa Senators Goaltending development coach, Justin Peters. Along with brother Anthony Peters, former professional goaltender and current Florida Everblades Assistant Coach will be holding a one day efficient movement clinic. The clinic will include a pre ice video presentation breaking down how to build a foundation and move efficiently. Finngoalie is excited to announce The East Coast Goaltenders Convention will return! Spend a weekend learning from expert goalies, coaches  and goalie experts from around the world. With presentations & demonstrations  on and off-ice.

The EAST COAST GOALTENDER COACH CONVENTION 

Held In Halifax, Nova Scotia . This goaltender convention will be a great learning experience for goaltender coaches/goaltenders. Goaltender coaches from Europe , United States  and Canada will come together for a weekend of sharing resources , training methods, presentations , gear & product demos on and off the ice!

Those attending the event will have an opportunity to take in various presentations on goaltending including:

Convention Details

  • Mental Training 
  • Minor Hockey Goaltender Development
  • Advanced Techniques
  •  Analytics & Video Coaching
  • Off-Ice Goaltender-Specific Training
  • Injury Prevention
  • Structuring Goaltending Programs
  • 7 Hours of  on ice demos & training
  • Gear Demo's
  • Coaches Night Out
  • And much more! 
When: June 27TH , 28TH ,29TH Where: Halifax , Nova Scotia  Cost: $120   Schedule :  Friday June 27th 1pm-8pm HRM4PAD  & Finngoalie Equipment & Training Centre Saturday June 28th 9am -5pm HRM4PAD & Finngoalie Equipment & Training Centre   Sunday June 29th 9am-3pm  HRM4PAD & Finngoalie Equipment & Training Centre

Throughout the day, coaches will get a chance to get on the ice and learn from some great coaches and instructors. Space is limited for this unique opportunity If you are interested in attending, please apply below.   There will be a cost of $120 for coaches to attend and participate in the weekend .

title: Finngoalie Goaltender Coaches Mentorship & Certification Program
excerpt: Finngoalie will continue to educate goalie coaches for it’s 12th year and spread its knowledge through international goalie coaches mentoring program. Every…
description_html:
Finngoalie will continue to educate goalie coaches for it’s 12th  year and spread its knowledge through international goalie coaches mentoring program. Every year we are getting increasing number of applications and therefore it is  possible to accept only four a year. If you are interested, read the program details below and send in your application now.

At the camp our mentoring program participants will work together with Jack Hartigan & Justin Goldman , certified Finngoalie coaches, pro week camp students and Finngoalies pro clients

Program is based on participation at the annual Finngoalie Pro Week camp & East Coast Goaltending Convention June 27th-30th  Halifax , Nova Scotia where you will be working together with  Finngoalies certified instructors & pro clients  and learn our system, philosophy & teaching methods. This summer program will be at HRM4PAD & Finngoalie Equipment & Training Centre

Once you have gone through the program and completed your tasks you will receive your official Finngoalie Certified Partner badge . More info on our certified partner program can be found here valid for 24 months. For that time period you can use certification to promote your services and your connection with lFinngoalie. After 24 months you are required to redo your certification in order to continue using Finngoalie Certified Partner Program . This is based on constantly changing methods and making sure coaches using Finngoalie certification are familiar with our latest knowledge. Finngoalie will maintain always up to date list of certified coaches on our certified partner page.

During the week you will also have a chance to be on the ice helping with Finngoalies  pro workout’s.

Finngoalie will provide you the mentoring, training,Finngoalies  coaches annual “clothing package”, lunches and Friday night coaches dinner / appreciation event & accommodation @ our partner hotel

Send your application to finngoalietraining@gmail.com and remember to include your hockey CV, personal information and a description why you want to be part of this program. We will close our application period February 16th 202
